scripts.build: npm run build -w @everywhere-qa/engine && npm run build -w @everywhere-qa/demo
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @everywhere-qa/engine && npm run typecheck -w @everywhere-qa/demo
scripts.audit:demo: npm run build -w @everywhere-qa/engine && node packages/engine/dist/cli.js audit --url http://localhost:3000/lab-broken --repo apps/demo --out artifacts/demo-audit
